title: guizotia scabra subsp. schimperi
intro: Guizotia scabra subsp. schimperi, also known as Ethiopian gold-of-pleasure, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the Horn of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Guizotia scabra subsp. schimperi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine in the region.
